sentiment: Each wave claims a little more of the shore before we even notice the water has risen.

stories.title: Google broke reCAPTCHA for de-googled Android users
stories.summary: When a gatekeeper decides you no longer belong, you feel it in the things you can no longer reach.

stories.title: AI is breaking two vulnerability cultures
stories.summary: The floor is moving and nobody has agreed on which direction is down.

stories.title: All my clients wanted a carousel, now it's an AI chatbot
stories.summary: The ask keeps changing, and the answer that felt permanent was always just the next answer.
